core_mechanism: a network of pairwise interactions between two-state (binary) units whose coupling strength decays as a tunable power law of inter-unit distance (J_ij ~ 1/d_ij^a), continuously interpolating from infinite-range (a=0) through Coulomb-like to short-range (a=3) coupling
brief_reason: The abstract's method rests on realizing an Ising-type spin-spin coupling J_ij ~ 1/d_ij^a with the exponent a tunable over 0<a<3, i.e. a distance-dependent power-law pairwise interaction among binary units whose range can be dialed continuously.
